name: Bingsu Summer push
cta: Order in store or pre-order — see menu
prompt: Sweet Life Bingsu campaign — taro and matcha bingsu, fresh-shaved ribbons, side-by-side with condensed milk drizzle, against warm cream background. Bold space for copy overlay on the right side.
product_context: Korean shaved-ice dessert, generous mound of finely shaved milk ice, drizzled with condensed milk, topped with crushed taro or matcha powder, mochi pieces. Real bingsu texture.
brand_context: Sweet Life café — Korean dessert café in Newry, NI. Warm cream paper, terracotta accents, ceramic bowl. Editorial. Forbidden: stock-photo cringe, plastic AI sheen.

name: Summer drinks lineup
hook: Iced everything — your summer drink is at Sweet Life
prompt: Five Sweet Life iced drinks in a row — Watermelon Breeze, iced matcha latte, raspberry jasmine tea, mango smoothie, brown sugar milk tea — all in tall slender glasses with condensation, marble café table, soft natural light.
product_context: Tall slender glasses with condensation, vibrant fruit colors, garnish of fresh fruit slices, ice cubes, layered drink colors.
brand_context: Sweet Life Newry — Korean café. Warm marble café table, soft window light, real photograph not synthetic.

name: Weekend brunch push
hook: Brunch at Sweet Life — weekends just got better
prompt: Sweet Life weekend brunch spread — French toast with bacon, acai granola bowl, salmon sunrise bagel, latte with rosetta, on a warm wood table with golden morning light through the window.
product_context: Full brunch spread: French toast with maple syrup and bacon, acai granola bowl with fresh berries, salmon and avocado bagel, latte with art. Plates and bowls in speckled ceramic.
brand_context: Sweet Life café — warm cream and wood interior, soft morning light, editorial brunch styling.

name: Bao Buns launch
hook: New: Bao Buns at Sweet Life
prompt: Three Sweet Life bao buns on a bamboo steamer — soft fluffy white steamed buns, generously filled with crispy chicken, beef and tofu variations, with sauce drizzles and garnishes. Atmospheric steam rising.
product_context: Soft fluffy Korean-Chinese bao buns, generously filled, on a bamboo steamer. Filings visible: crispy chicken, beef, tofu. Sauce drizzle on top.
brand_context: Sweet Life Newry — Korean café. Warm cream paper background, soft window light. New menu item announcement style.

name: 10% off — emergency workers
hook: Thank you for your service — 10% off for all emergency workers
cta: Show your ID at the counter
prompt: Sweet Life café atmosphere — a barista handing a takeaway coffee and pastry to a customer in soft focus, warm interior, ceramic mug, golden afternoon light. Generous, warm, no fakery.
product_context: Takeaway coffee in a Sweet Life cup, a pastry in a paper bag, exchanged hand-to-hand at the counter. Café interior in soft focus.
brand_context: Sweet Life café — warm and generous, café interior with hanging lights. Editorial lifestyle, soft warm tones.
